modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with using Label Filter in Excel

full_description_text: User trying to apply Label Filter in Excel. Can't figure out how to use it properly. Needs guidance on the steps involved. Frustration with the lack of clear instructions.
short_description: Issues with using Label Filter in Excel
description: User trying to apply Label Filter in Excel. Can't figure out how to use it properly. Needs guidance on the steps involved. Frustration with the lack of clear instructions.
